parameters.description: Only include attendances for events that match a recurring reservation's criteria. Format a reservation's unique `id`.

parameters.name: event_local_starts_at_gte
parameters.description: Only include attendances for sessions that start on or after a given timestamp in the venue's local timezone.

parameters.name: event_local_starts_at_lte
parameters.description: Only include attendances for sessions that start on or before a given timestamp in the venue's local timezone..

parameters.name: event_starts_at_gte
parameters.description: Only include attendances for events that start on or after a timestamp.

parameters.name: event_starts_at_lte
parameters.description: Only include attendances for events that start on or before a timestamp.

parameters.description: A comma-separated list of fields to expand.

parameters.name: fields
parameters.description: A comma-separated list of fields to include. Dot-notation can be used to select nested fields.

parameters.name: offering_types
parameters.description: Only include attendances for particular offering types. Format as comma-separated offering type `id` values.

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: A page number within the paginated result set.

parameters.name: page_size
parameters.description: Number of results to return per page.

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description:

* `event_starts_at` - Event starts at
* `-event_starts_at` - Event starts at (descending)
* `customer.created_at` - Customer.created at
* `-customer.created_at` - Customer.created at (descending)

parameters.description: The status `plans_to_attend` will include any attendances where the customer has registered or is on the waitlist.

parameters.name: active_hold_start_date_gte
parameters.description: Only include customer memberships with an active hold that starts on or after this date.

parameters.name: active_hold_start_date_lte
parameters.description: Only include customer memberships with an active hold that starts on or before this date.

parameters.name: customer
parameters.description: Only return customer memberships for particular customers. To filter by multiple, format as comma-separated customer `id` values.

parameters.description: A comma-separated list of fields to expand.

parameters.name: expiration_date_gte
parameters.description: Filter by expiration date (greater than or equal to)

parameters.name: expiration_date_lte
parameters.description: Filter by expiration date (less than or equal to)

parameters.name: fields
parameters.description: A comma-separated list of fields to include. Dot-notation can be used to select nested fields.

parameters.name: has_active_hold
parameters.description: Filter if the customer membership has an active (current or upcoming) hold.

parameters.name: has_expiration_date
parameters.description: Filter if the customer membership has an expiration date set.

parameters.name: ids
parameters.description: Only return particular customer memberships. Format as comma-separated `id` values.

parameters.name: membership
parameters.description: Only return customer memberships for particular memberships. To filter by multiple, format as comma-separated membership id values.

parameters.name: membership_type
parameters.description: Only return customer memberships for particular types. To filter by multiple, format as comma-separated type names.

parameters.name: owned_or_shared_with_customer

parameters.description: A page number within the paginated result set.

parameters.name: page_size
parameters.description: Number of results to return per page.

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description:
Ordering

* `membership.type` - Membership.type
* `-membership.type` - Membership.type (descending)
* `membership.name` - Membership.name
* `-membership.name` - Membership.name (descending)
* `status` - Status
* `-status` - Status (descending)
* `start_date` - Start date
* `-start_date` - Start date (descending)
* `expiration_date` - Expiration date
* `-expiration_date` - Expiration date (descending)

parameters.description: Filter by start date (greater than or equal to).

parameters.name: start_date_lte
parameters.description: Filter by start date (less than or equal to).

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: Only return customer memberships with particular statuses. To filter by multiple, format as comma-separated status names.

post.description:
Create a customer. When making the request as a provider, the customer will receive an invitation email they can use to claim the profile. When making the request as an anonymous customer, the customer will be created and immediately claimed. In this mode, the request must provide values for all fields on the signup form. These fields can be fetched by calling `GET /customer_fields?applicable_scenario=customer_registration`.

- Must have one of the following permissions: `pos`.

get.description:
Return a list of events.


#### Providers
- Must have one of the following permissions: `manage_events`, `attendances`, `instructor_manage_events`, `instructor_attendances`, `developer`, `pos`.


#### Customers
- Any customer can perform this action.
Caller can view active events that they or their family members are attending or waitlisted for, as well as any events that are visible on their registration timelines.


#### Unregistered Customers
- Any anonymous customer can perform this action.
Caller can view active events that are publicly listed.

parameters.name: TeamUp-Provider-ID
parameters.description: ID of the provider account the API request is for. Required if the access credentials have access to multiple providers.

parameters.name: Teamup-Request-Mode
parameters.description: The authenticated user may have access to both staff and customer profiles. Indicate which mode that request should run in. Customer mode is more limited. Required if the access credentials have access to both modes.

parameters.name: active_customer
parameters.description: Set the customer who will parameterize any customer-specific fields in the response, such as `active_registration_timeline`

parameters.name: applicable_to_recurring_reservation
parameters.description: Only include events that match a recurring reservation's criteria. Format a reservation's unique `id`.

parameters.name: category
parameters.description: Only include events for particular categories. Format as comma-separate offering type category id values.

parameters.name: ends_at_gte
parameters.description: Only include events that end on or after a given timestamp.

parameters.name: ends_at_lte
parameters.description: Only include events that end on or before a given timestamp.

parameters.name: expand
parameters.description: A comma-separated list of fields to expand.

parameters.name: fields
parameters.description: A comma-separated list of fields to include. Dot-notation can be used to select nested fields.

parameters.name: ids
parameters.description: Only include particular events. Format as comma-separated event `id` values.

parameters.name: instructors
parameters.description: Only include events taught by particular instructors. Format as comma-separated instructor `id` values, or use `me` to indicate events taught by yourself.

parameters.name: local_starts_at_gte
parameters.description: Only include events that start on or after a given timestamp in the venue's local timezone.

parameters.name: local_starts_at_lte
parameters.description: Only include events that start on or before a given timestamp in the venue's local timezone..

parameters.name: max_allowed_age
parameters.description: Only include events with a maximum allowed age of a given values in years.

parameters.name: min_allowed_age
parameters.description: Only include events with a minimum allowed age of a given values in years.

parameters.name: occupancy_status
parameters.description: Only include events with at least one of the following occupancy statuses.

parameters.name: offering_types
parameters.description: Only include events for particular offering types. Format as comma-separated offering type `id` values.

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: A page number within the paginated result set.

parameters.name: page_size
parameters.description: Number of results to return per page.

parameters.name: registration_timelines
parameters.description: Only include events associated with particular registration timelines. Format as comma-separated timeline `id` values.

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description:
Ordering

* `start` - Start
* `-start` - Start (descending)
* `end` - End
* `-end` - End (descending)

parameters.name: start_gte
parameters.description: Deprecated. Use `starts_at_gte`.

parameters.name: start_lte
parameters.description: Deprecated. Use `starts_at_lte`.

parameters.name: starts_at_gte
parameters.description: Only include events that start on or after a given timestamp.

parameters.name: starts_at_lte
parameters.description: Only include events that start on or before a given timestamp.

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: Only include events with a particular status.

parameters.name: venues
parameters.description: Only include events at particular venues. Format as comma-separated venue `id` values.

400.description: Bad Request - Invalid parameters or request body

401.description: Unauthorized - Invalid or missing authentication credentials

post.description:
This endpoint helps you understand a customer's options for completing a registration action on either a new or existing customer membership.

        The presence of any `global_restrictions` means the action is impossible. The customer's active memberships are listed in `membership_options`, and each includes applicable restrictions and prerequisites, along with the on-allotment price for completing the registration with it.

        ## Error Code Overview
        | Code  | Reasons | Provider Applicability | Customer Applicability |
        | ----- | ------- | ---------------------- | ---------------------- |
        | age_restricted | Age requirement not met. | - | appointment, class, room_rental | 
| already_attending | The customer is already attending. | appointment, class, room_rental | appointment, class, room_rental | 
| appointment_slot_unavailable | This appointment slot is not available | appointment, room_rental | appointment, room_rental | 
| customer_registration_block | You are unable to register for events. Please contact us for more information. | - | appointment, class, room_rental | 
| event_cancelled | This event is not active | appointment, class, room_rental | appointment, class, room_rental | 
| event_full | The event is full. | appointment, class | appointment, class, room_rental | 
| invalid_slot | invalid_slot | appointment, room_rental | appointment, room_rental | 
| max_daily_checkins | The customer has reached the daily checkin limit. | checkin | checkin | 
| maximum_daily_registrations | Cannot join waitlist because maximum registrations reached. Maximum registrations reached. | appointment | appointment, class, room_rental | 
| maximum_daily_waitlists | Maximum waitlists reached. | - | class | 
| maximum_weekly_registrations | Cannot join waitlist because maximum registrations reached. Maximum registrations reached. | appointment | appointment, class, room_rental | 
| membership_blocked_after_failed_payment | The membership is blocked due to failed payments. | appointment, checkin, room_rental | appointment, checkin, class, room_rental | 
| membership_blocked_manually | The membership has been manually blocked. | appointment, checkin, room_rental | appointment, checkin, class, room_rental | 
| membership_completed | The membership is not active because it has been completed. | appointment, checkin, room_rental | appointment, checkin, class, room_rental | 
| membership_expired | The membership is not active on this date because it has expired. | appointment, checkin, room_rental | appointment, checkin, class, room_rental | 
| membership_not_applicable | This membership does not apply to this registration. | appointment, checkin, room_rental | appointment, checkin, class, room_rental | 
| membership_on_hold | The membership is not active because it is on hold. | appointment, checkin, room_rental | appointment, checkin, class, room_rental | 
| membership_pending | The membership is not active because it has not started yet. | appointment, checkin, room_rental | appointment, checkin, class, room_rental | 
| membership_usage_restricted | The membership's usage limits have been met. | appointment, checkin, room_rental | appointment, checkin, class, room_rental | 
| registrations_closed | Registrations closed. | appointment | appointment, class, room_rental | 
| registrations_not_open | Registrations not open yet. | appointment | appointment, class, room_rental | 
    


#### Providers
- Any provider can perform this action.


#### Customers
- Any customer can perform this action.


#### Unregistered Customers
- *No access.*

return_to.description: The URL to return to after checkout is complete.

customer.description: The unique numeric identifier of the customer to unregister.

is_late_cancel.description: Can only be set in `provider` mode. If a customer makes the request, the late cancellation deadline will be used.

late.description: Whether the unregistering counted as a late cancel.
